metadata.description: Built-in marketplace for cc-haha. Currently ships the reverse-engineering plugin (multi-platform RE toolkit). Add more plugins to the plugins[] array as the team needs them.

plugins.name: reverse-engineering
plugins.description: Multi-platform reverse engineering toolkit. Static (Ghidra / radare2 / JADX / apktool) + dynamic (Frida instrumentation, GDB cross-arch single-step, LLDB Apple platforms) for binaries (PE/ELF/Mach-O), Android (APK), iOS, embedded firmware (MIPS/ARM/Cortex-M/PowerPC/68k/SuperH/RISC-V), and CTF.
